rawAssistant: Road kits are a smart choice for that stretch of road, especially with Thornbeast leading the way. Keep some Antidotes and Cold Salves in reserve, just in case. Don't forget to pack plenty of rations – you never know when you'll need them most. And don't leave without Twine or Bedrolls; we've had too many travelers stuck on the side of the road because they weren't prepared for a long night under the stars.
